title: Agua Dulces Lens
subtitle: Solo portraits · Nature · Pet sessions
about: Your story is captured in a warm and natural light. I offer a relaxed shoot and can photograph families, couples, birthdays, pets and so much more!

testimonials.quote: The golden hour shots of our home was really magical. We can't wait to get them framed for my parents to hang up in their house! Pleasure to work with Naari, captured exactly the things we envisioned and we couldn't be happier with how the photos turned out!
testimonials.author: Emily R.

testimonials.quote: Naari was so patient with our dog, she somehow got him to sit still long enough to get the perfect shots — really fun session and the photos are absolutely adorable!
testimonials.author: Jessica & Mark T.

testimonials.quote: Whenever we want some new dreamy self portraits we reach out to Naari, she is always so lovely to work with and naturally good at capturing these unique moments, would highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Lauren & Michael S.
